docTitle: IBhayibheli Ngokubuka Okukodwa · Kusukela ekuDalweni kuya eBandleni

share.title: IBhayibheli Ngokubuka Okukodwa
share.text: Ngokukhuphukela okukodwa, thola indaba enkulu yeBhayibheli — nokuthi kungani uJesu eza.

s.ui.footer: IBhayibheli Ngokubuka Okukodwa · Izicaphuno zeBhayibheli zithathwe ku-1959
s.hero.title:
IBhayibheli,
ngokubuka okukodwa
s.hero.sub: Ngokukhuphukela okukodwa, thola indaba enkulu yeBhayibheli — nokuthi kungani uJesu eza.
s.thread.note: UNkulunkulu uyathembisa (isivumelwano), abantu balinda isikhathi eside, ekugcineni konke kuyagcwaliseka kuphele kuJesu. Landela imibukiso eyi-13 engezansi ngalokho kuqhubeka — cindezela “Funda kabanzi” kuleyo naleyo khadi ukuze uthole indaba ejulile.
s.gospel.lead: IBhayibheli alisilo incwadi yokufundisa ngokuthi “yiba ngumuntu olungile.”
s.gospel.sublead: Yindaba yokuthi uNkulunkulu, ngomusa kuphela, wasindisa kanjani izoni ezazingeke ziziphephise zona ngokwazo. Esikhungweni sayo kumi uJesu Kristu.
s.gospel.mirror:
Umjikelezo ongapheli ka-Israyeli empeleni uwumfanekiso “wami”

Ukukhonza izithombe→Ukuhlupheka→Ukukhala→UNkulunkulu uyasindisa→Ukukhonza izithombe futhi…

Kusukela kubaHluleli kuze kube sekuthunjweni, u-Israyeli uphinda lo mjikelezo ungapheli. IBhayibheli alikulobanga lokhu ukuze sigcone sithi, “Yeka indlela ababelusizi ngayo.”

Kuyisibuko. Akukhona ukuthi “u-Israyeli wenza lokho” kodwa “nami ngenza okufanayo” (1 Korinte 10:11).

Isithombe akusiyo nje insalela ebaziweyo. Kuyiyo yonke into esiyithanda noma esiyethemba ukwedlula uNkulunkulu — imali, impumelelo, ukwamukelwa, abantu, ngisho nami uqobo. Nokusebenzisa uNkulunkulu njengethuluzi lokuthola engikufunayo nakho ukukhonza izithombe.

Ekugcineni, isithombe esijule kunazo zonke yi“mina uqobo, ngihlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi sikaNkulunkulu.”
s.gospel.coreIntro: Pho uNkulunkulu uyisindisa kanjani le soni? Nansi inhliziyo yevangeli iBhayibheli elilimemezelayo.
s.gospel.crux:
Lonke iBhayibheli likhomba endaweni eyodwa.

Abantu babengeke bawuqede umjikelezo wesono ngokwabo, futhi kwakungekho noyedwa olungileyo. Ngakho othile kwakumelwe akhokhe inani esikhundleni sabo.

UJesu akazange eze nje ukuze afundise okuhle kuphela. Njengoba kwakungekho enye indlela yokungisindisa, kwakumelwe eze.

Lowo okwakufanele alengiswe kuleso siphambano kwakuyimi.
UJesu wathwala isono sami wabethelwa lapho esikhundleni sami.

“Yebo, yalinyazwa ngenxa yeziphambeko zethu, yachotshozwa ngobubi bethu… nangemivimbo yayo siphilisiwe thina.” — Isaya 53:5
s.faq.q1: ▸ Ngakho umbulali kudingeka nje akholwe abese eya ezulwini, kanti umuntu ophile kahle impilo yakhe yonke kodwa ongakholwa uya esihogweni?
s.faq.a1:
Kuwumbuzo ofanele. Kodwa kufihleke ukungaqondi okubili kuwo.

① IBhayibheli alibahlukanisi abantu ngokuthi “abalungile vs. ababi.” Isilinganiso akusikho ukuthi “ungcono kunomakhelwane” kodwa “ubungcwele obuphelele bukaNkulunkulu.” Phambi kwakhe, akekho “olunge ngokwanele” (Roma 3:23). Ngakho lokhu akukhona “umuntu olungile vs. umbulali,” kodwa kufana nabantu ababili abanesifo esisodwa esibulalayo — omunye uyawuthatha umuthi, omunye uyawenqaba ethi, “Ngiphilile kunalowo muntu.”

② Yinto eyodwa kuphela ehlukanisa izulu nesihogo. Akusiwo amaphuzu okuziphatha, kodwa ukuthi ngabe umamukele yini uJesu Kristu njengeNkosi futhi inkinga yakho yesono ixazululekile. Lowo onesono sakhe esixazululwe ngegazi likaKristu uya ezulwini; lowo ongakaze amamukele, osono sakhe sisekhona, akayi. Awukho umsebenzi omuhle ongakwazi ukuxazulula inkinga yesono ngokwayo.

Ngakho izulu nesihogo akusiwo “umklomelo wokuziphatha okuhle” kodwa kuyindaba yobuhlobo noKristu. Futhi “ukukholwa” akusivumelwano ngengqondo kuphela kodwa kuwukushintsha kwalowo obusa impilo yakho — noma ngubani omamukela ngempela akazidli, kodwa uphenduka ngokujule kakhulu. Empeleni, ukuzilungisisa (“ngingumuntu olungile”) kuyisithombe esinzima kakhulu ukusiqeda, leso esenza sicabange ukuthi asimdingi uKristu (Luka 18:9-14).

IBhayibheli likusho kucace: “Okholwa yiyo kahlulelwa; ongakholwa usahlulelwe” (Johane 3:18). Ukwahlulela akukhona “ukukala impilo yakho lapho usufile,” kodwa sekuxazululiwe ngokuthi umamukele yini uKristu.

Roma 3:23 · Johane 3:18 · Efesu 2:8-9 · Luka 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ Akwanele yini ukuphila impilo elungile ngaphandle kokukholwa kuJesu?
s.faq.a2:
Yiwona mcabango ovame kakhulu, kodwa awuyiqondi ukuthi yini inkinga yangempela. Nasi isithombe.

Cabanga ukuthi usemkhunjini wabaphangi. Noma ngabe uwuhlanza kangakanani umkhumbi, unobungane kangakanani kubantu bawo, iphila kahle kangakanani impilo yakho — usengowabaphangi, ngoba uthwalwa kanye nomkhumbi uye lapho uya khona (ichweba lokwahlulelwa). Inkinga akusiwo “amaphuzu okuziphatha” kodwa “ungowamuphi umkhumbi” (ubunjalo bakho).

Ngakho ivangeli alithi “zama kakhulu ukuba muhle,” lithi “shintsha umkhumbi.” Yehla emkhunjini wesono uwelele kuJesu — ubunjalo obusha bomntwana kaNkulunkulu. Lokhu akukhona ukunyusa amaphuzu akho ngomzamo, kodwa ukwethemba Lowo owelulela isandla sakhe uwelele emkhunjini wakhe.

Empeleni iBhayibheli lichaza insindiso njengalokhu kanye kushintsha: “owasikhulula emandleni obumnyama nowasibeka embusweni weNdodana yothando lwakhe” (Kolose 1:13).

Ungaqondi kabi: lokhu akusho ukuthi impilo elungile ayinamsebenzi. Ukulunga akusiwo “umbandela” wensindiso kodwa isithelo sayo. Lowo oshintshe umkhumbi manje uphila kahle hhayi ngenxa yokwesaba, kodwa ngothando lomntwana.

Kolose 1:13 · Johane 1:12 · Johane 3:3 · Efesu 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Uma owonile ezizwa enokuthula, ethi “uNkulunkulu ungithethelele,” kanti olimele usahlupheka — akusho ukuthi umusa ushibhile kakhulu?
s.faq.a3:
Umbuzo ufanele, futhi ubuhlungu bungobangempela. Kodwa lolo hlobo lwesitatimende akusikho “ukuthethelela kweBhayibheli” — kuyisonakaliso saso.

① Ukuthethelela kukaNkulunkulu akukaze kube shibhile. Isono asimboziwe kungathi “asenzekanga”; uNkulunkulu uqobo wakhokha inani laso ngokuphila kweNdodana yakhe. Isiphambano asikhona ubufakazi bokuthi isono sithathwa kalula, kodwa kobukhulu baso — kuwukuthethelela okudula kunakho konke emhlabeni.

② Ukuphenduka kwangempela kuthela izithelo. Uma owonile ezidla phambi kolimele — “uNkulunkulu ungithethelele, ngakho nginokuthula” — lokho akukhona ukuphenduka kodwa ukulingisa kokuphenduka (Mathewu 3:8). Futhi ukuthethelela phakathi komuntu noNkulunkulu akusisuli isilonda solimele futhi akumphoqi olimele ukuba athethelele.

③ Isono asikaze nje “siyekwe.” Sonke isono sikhokhelwa kwenye yezindawo ezimbili — noma uKristu asithwale esiphambanweni (kwabakuye akusekho ukulahlwa, Roma 8:1), noma lowo omalayo kuze kube sekugcineni asithwale yena. Ngakho akukho “ukuthethelelwa okushibhile.” Owonile naye usenomthwalo ngokomthetho kuleli zwe (Roma 13:1-4).

④ Izinyembezi zolimele azikaze zibe ncinyane phambi kukaNkulunkulu. UNkulunkulu uyakhala nabakhalayo, ukhumbula zonke izinyembezi, ekugcineni uyozesula yena uqobo (IsAmbulo 21:4). Ngakho olimele akadingi ukuthwala umthwalo wokuphindisela yedwa, kodwa angakubeka kuNkulunkulu olungile (Roma 12:19 — “Ngokwami ukuphindisela, ngiyakubuyisela mina, isho iNkosi”).

Mathewu 3:8 · Roma 8:1 · Roma 13:1-4 · IsAmbulo 21:4
s.respond.sub: Lolu thando akusilo ulwazi kodwa isimemo. Uma uthando olwabethelwa esikhundleni sakho luthinte inhliziyo yakho, thandaza lokhu ngokunensa, umugqa nomugqa.
s.respond.prayer:
Nkulunkulu,

ngiyavuma ukuthi ngiyisoni esingakwazi ukuzisindisa.

Ngiyakholwa ukuthi uJesu wangifela esiphambanweni futhi wavuka.

Ngicela uthethelele zonke izono zami, kusukela manje ube yiNkosi yempilo yami.

Ngamukele njengomntwana wakho, ungenze ngiphile impilo entsha.

Ngegama likaJesu ngiyathandaza. Amen.
s.respond.after: Uma uthandaze lokhu ngobuqotho, iBhayibheli lithi usube ngumntwana kaNkulunkulu. Awusekho wedwa — thola ibandla eliseduze uhambe nabanye endleleni yokukholwa.
s.respond.verse: “Kepha bonke abamamukelayo wabapha amandla okuba babe ngabantwana bakaNkulunkulu.” — Johane 1:12 · Roma 10:9-10
s.closing.verse: “Nakufa, nakuphila… nanto enye edaliweyo akuyikuba namandla okusahlukanisa nothando lukaNkulunkulu olukuKristu Jesu iNkosi yethu.” — Roma 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Phezu kwale ndaba, uMthetho, izinkondlo, abaProfethi nezincwadi kungeza “inyama.”
Manje, noma yiyiphi incwadi oyivulayo, uyobona ukuthi ukuphi endabeni.
s.about.line: Kususelwa embonweni womlando wensindiso, wevangeli no-Reformed owabelwana ngawo ibandla iningi lamaProthestani aseKorea.

epochs.title: Ukudala
epochs.events: Izinsuku eziyisithupha zokudala, umuntu owenziwe ngomfanekiso kaNkulunkulu, ukuphumula kweSabatha
epochs.christ: Izwe lenziwa “ngeLizwi.” IVangeli likaJohane limemezela ukuthi leli Lizwi nguJesu uqobo (Johane 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
IBhayibheli aliqali ngempikiswano yefilosofi kodwa ngesimemezelo: “Ekuqaleni uNkulunkulu…” Izwe alisona ingozi kodwa liwumsebenzi kaNkulunkulu ongumuntu.

  • Umfanekiso kaNkulunkulu · kuzo zonke izidalwa, umuntu yedwa owenziwe ukuze afane noNkulunkulu — ukuze amazi futhi anakekele izwe.
  • Ukuphumula · ukuphumula kosuku lwesikhombisa kukhombisa konke kuphelele futhi kunokuthula (i-shalom): “kwakukuhle.”
  • I-Edene · izwe ngaphambi kokuba laphuke, lapho uNkulunkulu nabantu behamba ndawonye.

epochs.title: Ukuwa
epochs.one: Isono sangena, kwanqamuka isibopho phakathi kwabantu noNkulunkulu.
epochs.events: Ukudla isithelo esinqatshelwe, ukuxoshwa e-Edene, ukufika kokufa nokukhandleka
epochs.q: Ngizakubeka ubutha phakathi kwakho nowesifazane… Yona iyakuchoboza ikhanda lakho.
epochs.christ: Isithembiso sokuqala sevangeli, esinikezwa ngokushesha ngemva kokuWa: “inzalo yowesifazane” iyochoboza ikhanda lenyoka — futhi lowo nguJesu (Genesise 3:15; Roma 16:20; Galathiya 4:4).
epochs.detail:
Ngokungalaleli kokufuna “ukufana noNkulunkulu,” isono sangena ezweni. Umphumela akusikona nje umthetho ophukile kodwa ubuhlobo obuphukile.

  • Izibopho eziphukile · noNkulunkulu (ukucasha), nabanye (ukusola), nemvelo (ameva nokukhandleka).
  • Ukufa · isexwayiso esithi “uzakufa nokufa” siba yiqiniso.
  • Genesise 3:15 · kepha phakathi nokwahlulela, isithembiso sokusindisa siza kuqala. Izazi zikubiza ngokuthi i-protoevangelium (ivangeli lokuqala).
epochs.next: Manje uNkulunkulu ubiza umuntu oyedwa ukuze aqale insindiso…

epochs.title: Okhokho
epochs.events: Isivumelwano sika-Abrahama, ukunikelwa kuka-Isaka, amadodana ayishumi nambili kaJakobe, uJosefa ukhuphukela egunyeni eGibithe
epochs.q: Ngiyakukwenza isizwe esikhulu… imindeni yonke yomhlaba iyakubusiswa kuwe.
epochs.christ: Isithembiso sokuthi “imindeni yonke iyobusiswa” sigcwaliseka kuJesu, inzalo ka-Abrahama (Galathiya 3:16).
epochs.detail:
UNkulunkulu uqala ukubhekana nenkinga yesintu sonke ngokubiza umuntu oyedwa, u-Abrahama. Inhliziyo yakho yileso sivumelwano (isithembiso) — isizwe esikhulu, izwe, kanye “nesibusiso kuyo yonke imindeni.”

  • Ukukholwa · u-Abrahama wakholwa isithembiso esingabonakali, futhi kwabalelwa kuye kwaba ngukulunga (Genesise 15:6).
  • U-Isaka noJakobe · isithembiso siyaqhubeka; uJakobe (u-Israyeli) uzala izizwe eziyishumi nambili.
  • UJosefa · wathengiswa abafowabo kepha waphakanyiselwa egunyeni — “uNkulunkulu wakuceba kwaba kuhle” (Genesise 50:20).
epochs.next: Belandela uJosefa, umndeni wehlela eGibithe — wabe usuba yizigqila…

epochs.title: Ukuphuma nehlane
epochs.one: UNkulunkulu wasindisa abantu ababeyizigqila wabenza abakhe.
epochs.events: Izinhlupho eziyishumi, iPhasika, ukuwela uLwandle Olubomvu, iMiyalo Eyishumi eSinayi, itabernakele, iminyaka engu-40 ehlane
epochs.q: Ngiyakunithatha nibe yisizwe sami, mina ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu.
epochs.christ: IPhasika — lapho igazi lewundlu lasusa ukufa — likhomba kuJesu, “iwundlu lethu lePhasika,” elabethelwa ngenxa yethu (1 Korinte 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Insindiso enkulu kakhulu yeThestamente Elidala. U-Israyeli owayekade eyisigqila ukhululwa ngamandla kaNkulunkulu wenziwa isizwe sakhe.

  • IPhasika · indlu emakwe ngegazi lewundlu emnyango ayifikelwa ukufa — isibonelo ngemva kwayo yonke iminikelo eyalandela.
  • ULwandle Olubomvu · insindiso lapho indlela isiphelile; “ukuwela” kuba uphawu lwesiqalo esisha.
  • Isivumelwano saseSinayi · ngeMiyalo bafunda ukuthi baphile kanjani njengabantu bakaNkulunkulu.
  • Itabernakele · indawo engcwele enyakazayo lapho uNkulunkulu ehlala phakathi kwabantu bakhe — ukunambitha kusengaphambili “kuka-Emanuweli.”
  • Iminyaka engu-40 · ukungalaleli kugcina isizukulwane sizulazula ehlane, kepha uNkulunkulu uhlala eseduze ngemana nensika yefu nomlilo.
epochs.next: Bemi onqenqemeni lwezwe lesithembiso, bazilungiselela ukungena…

epochs.title: Ukunqoba nabaHluleli
epochs.one: Bathola izwe, kodwa bengenankosi yilowo nalowo wenza okumthokozisayo.
epochs.events: Ukuwa kweJeriko, ukuzinza eKhanani, umjikelezo ophindwayo wesono–ukwahlulela–ukusindiswa
epochs.q: Ngalezo zinsuku kwakungekho nkosi kwa-Israyeli; yilowo nalowo wenza okulungile emehlweni akhe.
epochs.christ: Ohlangothini lukaRuthe kuza uDavide, futhi ohlangothini lukaDavide kuza uJesu (Mathewu 1). Ngisho naphakathi kwesiphithiphithi, umuzi womndeni kaMesiya uyaqhubeka.
epochs.detail:
Ngaphansi kukaJoshuwa bangena ezweni lesithembiso, kodwa ngemva kokuzinza basheshe bamkhohlwe uNkulunkulu. AbaHluleli buyiphethini efanayo eqhubekayo.

  • Umjikelezo owehlayo · isono → ukucindezelwa → ukukhala → umhluleli uyasindisa → isono futhi. Kuya kuba kubi kakhulu.
  • AbaHluleli · uGideyoni, uSamsoni, uDebora — abasindisi besikhashana, abanesibindi kodwa abanamaphutha amaningi.
  • URuthe · indaba ekhanyayo yokwethembeka esikhathini esimnyama; owesifazane wesizwe esingaphandle ungena ohlangothini lukaDavide (nelikaJesu).

epochs.title: Umbuso ohlangene
epochs.one: UNkulunkulu uthembisa uDavide, “Isihlalo sakho sobukhosi siyohlala kuze kube phakade.”
epochs.events: Inkosi yokuqala uSawule, uDavide noGoliyati, isivumelwano sikaDavide, uSolomoni wakha ithempeli
epochs.q: Indlu yakho nombuso wakho kuyakuqiniswa njalo… isihlalo sakho sobukhosi siyakumiswa kuze kube phakade.
epochs.christ: “Isihlalo sobukhosi esiphakade” sigcwaliseka kuJesu, indodana kaDavide — yingakho ebizwa ngokuthi “iNdodana kaDavide” (Luka 1:32-33; Mathewu 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Isicongo sika-Israyeli, sibuswa amakhosi amathathu.

  • USawule · inkosi abantu abayifuna; isiqalo esihle esonakaliswa ukungalaleli.
  • UDavide · “umuntu ngokwenhliziyo kaNkulunkulu.” Unqoba uGoliyati, enza iJerusalema inhloko-dolobha. Wenza isono esikhulu (uBati-Sheba) kepha uyaphenduka ngenhliziyo yonke (iHubo 51).
  • Isivumelwano sikaDavide (2 Samuweli 7) · UNkulunkulu uthembisa ukumisa umkhaya kaDavide kuze kube phakade — impande enqumayo yethemba likaMesiya.
  • USolomoni · esicongweni sokuhlakanipha nengcebo wakha ithempeli, kodwa ngasekupheleni kokuphila kwakhe waphendukela ezithombeni.

epochs.title: Umbuso ohlukene
epochs.one: Wahlukana waba seningizimu (uJuda) nasenyakatho (u-Israyeli), isizwe sehlela encithakalweni.
epochs.people: Amakhosi emibuso yomibili; abaprofethi abanjengo-Eliya, u-Isaya, uJeremiya
epochs.events: Umbuso uyahlukana, ukukhonza izithombe kuyanda, abaprofethi bayaxwayisa
epochs.q: U-Israyeli wayeseyihlubuka-ke indlu kaDavide kuze kube namuhla.
epochs.christ: Kulesi sikhathi abaprofethi babikezela uMesiya ozayo ngokucaca okwengeziwe (Isaya 9:6; Isaya 53).
epochs.detail:
Ezinsukwini zendodana kaSolomoni isizwe sahlukana: umbuso wasenyakatho ka-Israyeli (izizwe eziyishumi, inhloko-dolobha iSamariya) nombuso waseningizimu kaJuda (izizwe ezimbili, inhloko-dolobha iJerusalema).

  • U-Israyeli (inyakatho) · zonke izinkosi zakhonza izithombe; uwa ku-Asiriya ngo-722 BC.
  • UJuda (iningizimu) · uhlangothi lukaDavide luyaqhubeka, kunamakhosi amahle ambalwa anjengoHezekiya noJosiya, kodwa jikelele uyehla.
  • AbaProfethi · u-Eliya, u-Amose, u-Isaya, uJeremiya bakhala bathi “buyani!” Isiprofetho sikaMesiya sifinyelela esicongweni saso lapha (“inceku ehluphekayo” yaka-Isaya 53).
epochs.next: Ekugcineni ukwahlulela okwakuxwayiswe ngakho kuyeza — bayathunjwa…

epochs.title: Ukuthunjwa
epochs.one: Isizwe siyadilika futhi abantu badonswa baya emazweni angaphandle.
epochs.events: U-Israyeli uwela ku-Asiriya (722), uJuda uwela eBabele kuchithwe ithempeli (586)
epochs.q: Ngasemifuleni yaseBabele sahlala khona, sakhala, lapho sikhumbula iSiyoni.
epochs.christ: Ekujuleni kokuphelelwa yithemba uJeremiya uthembisa “isivumelwano esisha” (Jeremiya 31:31) — kanye nesivumelwano uJesu asibeka eSidlweni Sokugcina.
epochs.detail:
Izexwayiso ziyafezeka. Ithempeli liyasha futhi abantu badonselwa eBabele — belahlekelwa yizwe, inkosi, nethempeli: iphuzu eliphansi kunawo wonke.

  • Ukuwa kabili · u-Israyeli (i-Asiriya, 722 BC) noJuda (iBabele, 586 BC).
  • UDaniyeli · isibonelo sokukholwa ngisho nasenkantolo yabezizwe (umgodi wamabhubesi); ubona imibono “yombuso ophakade” ozayo.
  • Inhlansi yethemba · umbono kaHezekeli wamathambo omileyo abuya aphila (Hezekeli 37) “nesivumelwano esisha” sikaJeremiya kukhomba ikusasa ebumnyameni.
epochs.next: Ngemva kweminyaka engamashumi ayisikhombisa, uNkulunkulu uvula indlela — baya ekhaya…

epochs.title: Ukubuya
epochs.events: Ukubuya ngomthetho kaKoresi, ukwakhiwa kabusha kwethempeli, ukubuyiselwa kwezindonga zaseJerusalema, ukubuyiselwa kweZwi
epochs.christ: UMalaki, incwadi yokugcina yeThestamente Elidala, iphetha ngokubikezela isithunywa esilungiselela indlela kaMesiya: “Bhekani, ngiyathuma isithunywa sami” (Malaki 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Ngomthetho wenkosi yasePheresiya uKoresi (538 BC) ukubuya kuyaqala. Ngamagagasi amathathu babuya bakha kabusha lokho okwakudilikile.

  • UZerubabeli · wakha kabusha ithempeli (laphela ngo-516 BC).
  • U-Ezra · ufundisa iZwi futhi avuselele ukukholwa.
  • UNehemiya · wakha kabusha izindonga zaseJerusalema ezinsukwini ezingu-52.
  • U-Esteri · usindisa amaJuda asePheresiya ekubhujisweni — “ngenxa yesikhathi esinjengalesi.”
  • Kusafisekiwe · ithempeli limi, kodwa ayikho inkosi enjengoDavide. Abantu balindela uMesiya.
epochs.next: Bese-ke… sengathi izulu lithula du, kudlula iminyaka engu-400.

epochs.title: Iminyaka yokuthula
epochs.one: Iminyaka engu-400 kungekho zwi lomprofethi — kepha isiteji sasilungiswa buthule.
epochs.events: IPheresiya → iGrisi → inkululeko yamaMakabe → ukubusa kwaseRoma
epochs.q: Kepha lapho sekufikile ukuphelela kwesikhathi, uNkulunkulu wathuma iNdodana yakhe, izelwe ngowesifazane.
epochs.christ: Konke lokhu “kulungiswa kwesiteji” kwakunguNkulunkulu osebenzayo ukuze uJesu eze ngqo “ekupheleleni kwesikhathi.”
epochs.detail:
Kusukela kuMalaki kuya eThestamenteni Elisha, kudlula cishe iminyaka engu-400 kungekho mbhalo omusha. Kepha ngemuva komlando uNkulunkulu wayelungisa indlela yevangeli.

  • Imibuso iyashintsha izandla · iPheresiya → iGrisi (u-Alexander, 333 BC) → amaPtolemy namaSeleucid → ukuvukela kwamaMakabe (167 BC) → iRoma (63 BC).
  • IsiGrikhi · ukunqoba kuka-Alexander kwenza isiGrikhi ulimi olujwayelekile; iThestamente Elidala lahunyushelwa esiGrikhini (i-Septuagint), kuvula indlela yokuthi ivangeli lisabalale ngokushesha.
  • Imigwaqo nokuthula kweRoma · imigwaqo eyakhiwe kahle “ne-Pax Romana” iba imigwaqo yokushumayela.
  • Amasinagoge namaqembu · ukufundisa kwesinagoge kuyajiya; abaFarisi nabaSadusi bayavela; nokulangazelela uMesiya kuyavuthwa.

epochs.title: UJesu uyeza
epochs.one: UMesiya owathenjiswa weza, wafa, wabuye wavuka.
epochs.people: UJesu, abafundi abayishumi nambili, uJohane uMbhapathizi
epochs.events: Ukuthatha kwakhe umzimba womuntu, inkonzo yakhe nokufundisa nezimangaliso, ukufa esiphambanweni, ukuvuka ngosuku lwesithathu
epochs.q: ULizwi waba yinyama, wakha phakathi kwethu, sabona inkazimulo yakhe… egcwele umusa neqiniso.
epochs.christ: Inzalo yowesifazane (umbukiso 2), isibusiso sika-Abrahama (3), iwundlu lePhasika (4), inkosi ephakade kaDavide (6), isivumelwano esisha (8) — konke kugcwaliseka emuntwini oyedwa, uJesu: umProfethi wethu wangempela, umPristi neNkosi.
epochs.detail:
Ukuthula kuyaphuka; lowo owathenjiswa uyafika. AmaVangeli amane afakaza ngokuphila, ukufa nokuvuka kukaJesu ngezici ezine.

  • Ukuthatha umzimba womuntu · uNkulunkulu uba umuntu (u-Emanuweli, “uNkulunkulu unathi”), endaweni ephansi yaseBhetlehema.
  • Inkonzo · ufundisa umbuso kaNkulunkulu, welapha abagulayo, ubiza izoni. “Ongibonile ubonile uBaba.”
  • Isiphambano · ukhokha inani lesono nokufa okwalethwa ukuWa (umbukiso 2). Iwundlu lePhasika langempela.
  • Ukuvuka · evuka ngosuku lwesithathu, uchitha amandla esono, ukufa, noSathane — kakade esiphambanweni “ebaphucile ababusi nabanamandla izikhali… ebanqoba” (Kolose 2:15).

Ngakho uJesu ungumProfethi wethu wangempela (esikhombisa indlela eya kuNkulunkulu), umPristi wethu wangempela (ehlawulela isono ngomzimba wakhe), neNkosi yethu yangempela (enqoba isono, ukufa, noSathane, ebusa kuze kube phakade).
epochs.next: UJesu ovukile uthuma abafundi bakhe ezweni…

epochs.title: Ibandla liyaqala
epochs.one: UMoya uyeza, ivangeli lisabalala liye emikhawulweni yomhlaba.
epochs.events: UMoya uthululwa ngePhentekoste, ibandla liyazalwa, ivangeli lisabalala lisuka eJerusalema liya eRoma ngokushushiswa
epochs.q: Nizakwamukeliswa amandla, uMoya oNgcwele esefikile phezu kwenu… kuze kube sekugcineni komhlaba.
epochs.christ: Le ndaba isaqhubeka nanamuhla. IBhayibheli liphetha ngesithembiso sokuthi uJesu uyobuya futhi enze izinto zonke zibe zintsha (IsAmbulo 21).
epochs.detail:
Ngemva kokwenyukela kukaJesu, uMoya owathenjiswa uyeza ngePhentekoste futhi ibandla liyazalwa. Ivangeli lisabalala ngokuqhuma.

  • IPhentekoste · uMoya uphendula abafundi abesabayo babe ngofakazi abanesibindi.
  • UPetru · ushumayela ivangeli kumaJuda eJerusalema.
  • UPawulu · esuka kumshushisi waba umphostoli, etshala amabandla emhlabeni wabezizwe ebhala izincwadi.
  • Kuze kube sekugcineni komhlaba · iJerusalema → iJudiya → iSamariya → iRoma. Isithembiso esenziwa ku-Abrahama “sayo yonke imindeni” siyafezeka.
  • Nathi · indaba ayipheli; iqhubeka iya ekubuyeni kukaJesu nezulu elisha nomhlaba omusha.

epochs.title: Ukubuyiselwa (konke kube kusha)
epochs.one: UJesu uyabuya enze izinto zonke zibe zintsha.
epochs.events: Ukubuya kwesibili, ukwahlulela kokugcina, ukuphela kwesono·ukufa·izinyembezi, izulu elisha nomhlaba omusha
epochs.q: Azesule izinyembezi zonke emehlweni abo; ukufa akusayikuba khona; nokudabuka, nokukhala, nobuhlungu akusayikuba khona.
epochs.christ: I-Edene yokudala kokuqala ekugcineni ibuyiselwa “njengeJerusalema Elisha.” UNkulunkulu uhlala nabantu bakhe kuze kube phakade — ukugcwala kuka-Emanuweli (IsAmbulo 21:3; Mathewu 1:23).
epochs.detail:
IBhayibheli aliphethi ngenkathi yebandla. Incwadi yalo yokugcina, IsAmbulo, ikhombisa uJesu ebuya ukuze aqede konke.

  • Ukubuya kwesibili · inkosi eyathenjiswa ibuya ngenkazimulo.
  • Ukunqoba kokugcina · uSathane nokufa kuyanqotshwa kuze kube phakade, futhi uKristu ubusa njengeNkosi yamakhosi (1 Korinte 15:25-26; IsAmbulo 20:10).
  • Ukwahlulela nokuvuka · konke okungalungile kuyalungiswa, abafileyo bayavuswa.
  • Izulu elisha nomhlaba omusha · isono, ukufa, izinyembezi nobuhlungu kuyanyamalala kuze kube phakade (IsAmbulo 21:4).
  • I-Edene ebuyiselwe · “eJerusalema Elisha” elingcono kunesiqalo, uNkulunkulu uhlala nabantu bakhe kuze kube phakade — umgomo lonke iBhayibheli eliqonde kuwo.

Ngakho manje isikhathi “sekuvele, kodwa kungakapheleli”: kuJesu insindiso isivele yafezeka, kodwa ukuphelela kwayo kusalindelwe.
epochs.next: Pho yini eshiwo yiyo yonke le ndaba “kumina”?

love: Indaba ayiqali ngokwahlulela kodwa ngokudala okuthululwe ngothando.
Ngomzuzu abantu bona ngawo, uNkulunkulu wathembisa insindiso lapho khona.
UNkulunkulu weza kuqala kumuntu ongakufanele, wambiza ngegama, wamenza umgudu wesibusiso.
Wezwa ukububula kwabantu ababeyizigqila, wehlela phansi ukuzobasindisa yena uqobo.
Ekhashelwa kaningi futhi nakaningi, kepha nakanjani lapho bekhala wathuma umsindisi wabaphakamisa.
Akazange amlahle ngisho noDavide owayewile, futhi ngaye wathembisa iNkosi yaphakade.
Kubantu abamfulathela, waqhubeka ethuma abaprofethi, encenga, “Sicela ubuye ekhaya.”
Wahamba nabo ngisho nasezweni elimnyama kunawo wonke lokuthunjwa, wathembisa ukubuyiselwa.
Ngisho nakubantu abahluleka kaningi futhi nakaningi, akazange asibuyise isithembiso sakhe.
Ngisho naphakathi neminyaka engu-400 yokuthula, engabonakali, wayelungisa indlela yensindiso.
Sisengabasoni, wathuma iNdodana yakhe ukuze idele ukuphila kwayo.
Uthando esaluthola, manje uluthumela lugobhoze emhlabeni wonke.
Ekugcineni uyokwesula zonke izinyembezi enze izinto zonke zibe zintsha ngothando.

mis.w: “Kungani uNkulunkulu enza abantu ababengona? Bekungaba ngcono yini ukuthi angasenzi nhlobo?”
mis.t: UNkulunkulu wadala izwe nabantu hhayi ngenxa yokuntula okuthize, kodwa ngothando oluchichimayo. Ukwenza abantu babe ngabantu abaxhumana noNkulunkulu ngokwakho kuwuthando. Futhi ngisho nokungena kwesono kwakungaphandle kwecebo lensindiso likaNkulunkulu (Efesu 1:4-5). Umbukiso wokuqala weBhayibheli akusikho ukwahlulela kodwa uthando.

mis.w: “Ukuxoshwa anikwe nokufa ngenxa nje yokudla isithelo esisodwa — ingabe uNkulunkulu akalukhuni ngokweqile?”
mis.t: Ukukhishwa e-Edene kwakuwukwahlulela nomusa kanyekanye. Ukudla emthini wokuphila uphile phakade kuleso simo esiphukile, esahlukaniswe noNkulunkulu, kwakuyobamba umuntu ekuhluphekeni kuze kube phakade (Genesise 3:22). Ukuvumela ukufa kwavula indlela yokubuya, futhi lapho khona uNkulunkulu wathembisa uMsindisi (Genesise 3:15). Uthando lwaluvele lukhona ngaphakathi kokwahlulela.

mis.w: “U-Abrahama wakhethwa ngenxa yokukholwa kwakhe okukhulu — akusiwo wonke amaqhawe okuziphatha abantu beBhayibheli?”
mis.t: U-Abrahama waqamba amanga futhi wangabaza; uJakobe wayengumkhohlisi. UNkulunkulu akazange abize abantu “abafanelekayo” kodwa abanamaphutha, ngomusa. Isizathu kwakungesikho ukulunga kwabo kodwa uthando oluthembekile lukaNkulunkulu (Duteronomi 7:7-8).

mis.w: “Ingabe umthetho (iMiyalo) akusiwo isivivinyo okumelwe usiphumelele ukuze usindiswe?”
mis.t: UNkulunkulu wabasindisa ngaphambi kokunika umthetho. Ngisho neMiyalo Eyishumi iqala ngesimemezelo sensindiso: “NginguJehova uNkulunkulu wakho owakukhipha ezweni laseGibithe” (Eksodusi 20:2). Umthetho awusho ukuthi “wugcine ukuze usindiswe,” kodwa uyisiqondiso sothando sokuthi abantu abasindisiwe bafanele baphile kanjani (Duteronomi 7:7-9). Umusa uhlala uqala kuqala; ukulalela kuyimpendulo.

mis.w: “Ukunqoba iKhanani kwakuwukubulala okungenamusa — ngakho uNkulunkulu weThestamente Elidala ngempela unesihluku.”
mis.t: Lesi yisihloko esinzima esingenakuxazululwa ngomusho owodwa. Kodwa iBhayibheli alikwethuli njengodlame olungenanqondo kodwa njengokwahlulela ngemva kwamakhulu eminyaka okubekezela ububi obukhulu (kuhlanganisa nokunikela ngezingane) (Genesise 15:16; Duteronomi 9:4-5; Levitikusi 18:24-25). UNkulunkulu uyephuza ngisho nasekwahluleleni, futhi wabamukela ngenjabulo labo abaphendukela kuye — ngisho nabezizwe abanjengoRahabi noRuthe (Joshuwa 6:25; Ruthe 4:13-17).

mis.w: “UDavide wayeyiqhawe elingenasici — yingakho ebizwa ‘ngomuntu ngokwenhliziyo kaNkulunkulu.’”
mis.t: UDavide wenza ubufebe ngisho nokubulala. “Umuntu ngokwenhliziyo kaNkulunkulu” akusho ukuthi ophelele, kodwa lowo ongazange afihle isono sakhe — owaphenduka ngokuphelele waqhubeka ebuyela kuNkulunkulu (iHubo 51). Uthando lukaNkulunkulu alulahli ngisho nalabo abawa kabi.

mis.w: “Umprofethi ngumbhuli obikezela ikusasa / uNkulunkulu weThestamente Elidala uthukuthele kuphela.”
mis.t: Inhliziyo yomprofethi akusikho “ukubikezela ikusasa” kodwa isikhalo sikaNkulunkulu esibuhlungu: “Sicela ubuye.” Ngisho nezexwayiso zokwahlulela aziqondene nokubhubhisa kodwa ukubuyisa abantu nokubasindisa — “angithokozi ngokufa komubi” (Hezekeli 33:11).

mis.w: “Ukuthunjwa kufakazela ukuthi uNkulunkulu wamlahla ngokuphelele u-Israyeli.”
mis.t: Ukuthunjwa kwakungekho ukulahla kodwa ukuyala nokuhlanza ngakumntwana othandekayo (Hebheru 12:6). UNkulunkulu akazange ahambe; wayenoDaniyeli phakathi nokuthunjwa wathembisa, “Ngiyazi mina imicabango engiyicabanga ngani — imicabango yokuthula kungengeyobubi ukuba ngininike isikhathi esizayo nethemba” (Jeremiya 29:11).

mis.w: “Njengoba kungekho zwi iminyaka engu-400, uNkulunkulu wayehambile noma ephumule.”
mis.t: Ukuthula akusikho ukungabikho. Wayengakhulumi nje, kanti kuso sonke leso sikhathi wayehambisa imibuso, izilimi, nemigwaqo ukuze alungise isiteji sensindiso. Ngomzuzu othule kakhulu, uNkulunkulu wayesebenza kakhulu, ngothando (Galathiya 4:4).

mis.w: “UJesu wayengumfundisi nje oyedwa olungile wokuziphatha / isiphambano kwakuwukuhlulwa okudabukisayo.”
mis.t: UJesu wathi unguNkulunkulu uqobo (Johane 8:58), futhi isiphambano kwakungesona isigameko noma ukuhlulwa kodwa uthando olwahlelwa. Akazange ahudulelwe lapho ngempoqo; wadela ukuphila kwakhe ngokwakhe (Johane 10:18). “Akakho onothando olukhulu kunalolo lokuba adele ukuphila kwakhe ngenxa yabahlobo bakhe” (Johane 15:13).

mis.w: “Ibandla liyiqembu labantu abaphelele, noma liyisakhiwo nje.”
mis.t: Ibandla alisona umphakathi “wabangcwele abaphelele” kodwa wezoni ezithethelelweyo. Ngisho nomphostoli uPawulu wazibiza ngokuthi “engingesikhulu” kwezoni (1 Thimothewu 1:15). Ibandla lokuqala laxabana futhi lakhubeka (IzEnzo 6:1; 1 Korinte 1:11). Akusiyo indawo yokuziqhayisa, kodwa abantu abadlulisela uthando abaluthola (Johane 13:34-35).

core.title: Isono sokuzalwa — akekho olungileyo
core.body: Inkinga akusikho “izenzo ezimbalwa ezimbi” kodwa impande yenhliziyo. Kusukela ku-Adamu, wonke umuntu uzalwa ngaphansi kwesono futhi ngeke afinyelele kuNkulunkulu ngokwakhe.
core.vtext: Akakho olungileyo, akakho noyedwa… ngokuba bonke bonile, basilalelwe inkazimulo kaNkulunkulu.

core.title: Umthetho awukwazi ukungisindisa
core.body: Umthetho akusiwo isikhwelo kodwa isibuko. Ngokuthi uzame kakhulu, kanjalo ukhombisa ukuthi uphuthelwe kangakanani. Inhloso yawo ukusiholela kuKristu.
core.vtext: Ngomthetho kukhona ukwazi isono… umthetho sewaba ngumlayi wethu wokusiyisa kuKristu.

core.title: Ngomusa — isipho, hhayi umzamo
core.body: Insindiso akusiyo inkokhelo yomsebenzi owuzuzile, kodwa isipho samahhala kulabo abangakufanele. Ngakho akekho ongaziqhayisa.
core.vtext: Ngokuba ngomusa nisindisiwe ngokukholwa… akuveli ngemisebenzi, ukuze kungabikho ozibongayo.

core.title: Silungisiswa ngokukholwa
core.body: Akukhona ngokugcina umthetho, kodwa ngokukholwa kuJesu Kristu, sibalwa silungile — sigqokiswa hhayi ngokulunga kwethu kodwa ngokwakhe.
core.vtext: Lokhu sesilungisisiwe ngokukholwa… umuntu akalungisiswa ngemisebenzi yomthetho, kuphela ngokukholwa nguKristu Jesu.

core.title: IBhayibheli likhomba kuJesu
core.body: IBhayibheli akusiyo incwadi yamadoda amakhulu noma yokuzisiza. Kusukela kuGenesise kuya kuIsAmbulo, ikhasi ngalinye lifakaza ngomuntu oyedwa — uJesu Kristu.
core.vtext: Nihlola imibhalo… yiyona efakaza ngami… wabachasisela emibhalweni okuqondene naye.

core.title: Umbuso kaNkulunkulu — umyalezo omkhulu kaJesu
core.body: Isihloko uJesu asifundisa kakhulu. Ukubusa kukaNkulunkulu njengeNkosi kwangena kuleli zwe noJesu futhi kuyophelela lapho ebuya. Ngesiphambano nokuvuka kwakhe, uJesu uyiNkosi yangempela enqobe isono, ukufa, noSathane.
core.vtext: Isikhathi sigcwalisekile, umbuso kaNkulunkulu ususondele; phendukani, nikholwe yivangeli.

core.title: Ivangeli — wakufeza konke
core.body: Inani lesono ebengingeke ngilikhokhe, uJesu walikhokha esikhundleni sami esiphambanweni, futhi ngokuvuka wanqoba ukufa. Ngiphumula hhayi ku-“yenza lokhu” kodwa ku-“kufeziwe.”
